title: USD Identifier Scanner Unit Contract

included: embedded identifier scanning from a caller-selected offset
deferred: complete Unicode XID database conformance tables
malformed byte-sequence injection through JSON adapters

input.prefix: source prefix before the scan start

output.remaining: source text after the matched span

input.prefix: source prefix before the scan start

output.remaining: source text after the matched span

laws: validate(valid).canonical must equal the input text
scan_identifier(prefix + identifier + delimiter, prefix).span must equal identifier
scan_identifier must stop before caller-owned delimiters
scan_continue must consume exactly one valid identifier-continuation code point
namespaced property names must be colon-separated non-empty identifier components
keywordless validation must reject reserved USDA keywords

adapter_protocol.input: A JSON file containing one case with an ops array.
adapter_protocol.output: A JSON object with ok, diagnostics, and results. This uses the same adapter shape as handle tests but does not require persistent handles.
